summary: The user sought recommendations for advanced yoga poses targeting lower back muscles and tips for preventing lower back pain during practice. The session included discussions on breath exercises, additional poses for lower back strength, cooling down techniques, and suggestions for structuring a yoga routine.
facts: The user is excited to incorporate advanced yoga poses and breath exercises into their yoga practice. The user plans to try poses like Natarajasana, Ustrasana, and Dhanurasana under the guidance of a teacher. The user expressed a desire to prevent lower back pain while practicing yoga. The user is interested in incorporating cooling down poses like Seated Forward Bend and Legs Up the Wall Pose after intense yoga sessions. The user is open to modifying their yoga routine based on personal preferences and goals. The user intends to focus on their breath to maintain relaxation and mindfulness during practice. The user is looking for variety in their yoga practice and is willing to mix poses each time they practice.
